// Start a Project

Let's Build
Something.

Tell me what you're working on. The first call is about understanding the problem — not selling you a solution.

// Send a Message
No spam. No sales calls. Just a real reply.
// Contact Info
Email
dataforge316@gmail.com
Location
Wichita, KS — Remote Friendly
Response Time
Within 24 Hours
// What Happens Next
  1. 01 You send this form or email directly.
  2. 02 I reply within 24 hours with a few targeted questions.
  3. 03 We do a 30-minute call to assess fit and clarify what I'd need to see.
  4. 04 I review your materials, data, or process documentation.
  5. 05 You receive a written proposal with scope, timeline, and fixed price.
